entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop being studied for disease resistance.

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A fungal disease that causes wilting in plants.

entities.name: RACE 2
entities.description: A specific race of the fusarium wilt pathogen.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist infection by fusarium wilt.

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: The genetic loci that control the resistance to fusarium wilt.

entities.name: HOMOZYGOUS RECESSIVE
entities.description: A genetic condition where an individual has two recessive alleles for a trait.

entities.name: DOMINANT FORM
entities.description: A genetic condition where an individual has at least one dominant allele for a trait.

entities.name: COMPLETE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The state of total resistance to the pathogen.

entities.name: EARLY WILTING
entities.description: The manifestation of disease symptoms at an early stage.

entities.name: LATE WILTING
entities.description: The manifestation of disease symptoms at a late stage.

relationships.description: is a required state for the first gene for resistance
is a required state for the second gene for resistance
